title: Better Experience of Confluence
description: Provide auto fishing machine, more block breaking tool and infinite item comsuming.
body:
**Official external mod of Confluence : Otherworld.** 

***

Better game experience such as:

*   infinite arrows
*   infinite potion
*   auto fish machine
*   faster block breaking
*   forbidden lava slime generate lava
*   no strict for herb and stone sapling tree

We've added an automatic fishing machine for easy and fast fishing.  

We've added the magic staff wand to break blocks quickly.  

We've added a number of config items to customize the rules of the game.  

We've recreated the classic Terraria bug.

There will be more in the future.
